hero.headline: I design digital products that make complexity feel clear, confident, and worth using.
hero.description: I combine SaaS product experience, visual craft, and classroom insight to sharpen journeys, reduce friction, and give ambitious products more conviction.

workIntro: These projects show how I use structure, pace, and interaction detail to make products feel sharper from the first screen.
writingIntro: I write about product design, UX, accessibility, and making digital experiences easier to understand and harder to abandon.

linkedin.title: For the professional version of the conversation, head to LinkedIn.
linkedin.description: I use LinkedIn for role updates, product thinking, and the overlap between design, accessibility, and teaching. If you're hiring or building, start there.

contact.title: If you've got a role, product, or idea that needs sharper thinking, let's talk.
contact.description: I’m open to product design roles, freelance work, and thoughtful collaborations. Send a few details and I’ll come back with something useful.
